textByHashes.6a701adc5cffcae5ee0a4cec0b5e2ed66c919260: That's what we would all like to know.
textByHashes.6dbb72cf1cbe7ff3e22bf4f0226f5ed591886327: Times are hard here at the moment. We've been here for too long and there is not much food left, or places where I can take my goats.
textByHashes.6fd4d2fc53e7c9dcf884435d4da16aecfeda68f7: If only it were so easy!
textByHashes.470a193a3c8590fc87e2ba91c5157111525c1afe: I have heard there is a certain kind of fruit... that will grow even here, in the mountains.
textByHashes.96260cd2d0b70774b3c5f960e7479fd59d94613c: It is called White Pearl, named after its white appearance.
textByHashes.51e502f1a65225517aa24e0018278a03aacac28c: I do not know. I believe it grows mainly in the mountains, and it can grow in even the most difficult circumstances.
textByHashes.652fbe2423d7046e543db0e36c2ba319f2886ec0: We cannot move on until we find the chieftain's daughter, and we do not generally move far inland. But perhaps you can search for it.
textByHashes.422ac723dc4ab6dda7cac50ec5f39a4c7a88d846: I do not know, outerlander, but you might want to try looking on mountains.
textByHashes.2496bfa6875f9de10435517e3f592b21d9415b6b: No, if it grew on here I would have known.
textByHashes.fadbce863cd92a8e6920805d8506e1a57ccac5ad: You seem to be quite resourceful, outerlander. Go and show it to the chieftain.
textByHashes.59a234aa27f82a0f044a040b1bbe99870e1e77cf: I must thank you for your generous gift, outerlander.
textByHashes.a8db20f889487810639691a94df9e023d7c9f381: Yes, the seed of the White Pearl. It grows remarkably well.
textByHashes.ed78e085c2d1a74cf177a06694e01cc7bf6d79cf: You are unusually helpful for an outerlander, .
